name: openclaw-frontier-stack
description: Interoperable agent skills + hooks + orchestration harness. 68 skills (37 marketing + creative as Modern Skills, 28 engineering workflow, 3 operator), 11 role contracts, engineer CLI (openclaw) with goal templating + state persistence + ticketing, live agent runner daemon (openclaw-agent), 4 coordination patterns (fan-out, fan-in, chain, voting), 5 autonomous loops, and a Rust core workspace. Compatible with any agent that supports the Agent Skills specification (agentskills.io).
